scenario.title: The API Response Builder
scenario.context: You're designing an AI-powered API that processes customer support tickets. The response needs to follow a strict schema that includes conditional fields, enums, and proper error handling - all in a format that passes JSON Schema validation.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that generates API-style JSON responses with discriminated unions, enums, and conditional required fields.
constraints: If status is 'escalated', include required 'escalation_reason' and 'priority' fields
If status is 'resolved', include required 'resolution_summary' field
scenario.exampleInput: Ticket: Customer can't log in. After investigation: Password was expired. Reset link sent. Customer confirmed access restored.
hints: Use discriminated union pattern - different shapes based on status
Show examples for each status type

scoringGuide.excellent: All enum values listed with descriptions
Clear conditional rules with examples for each status

rubric.name: Schema Completeness
rubric.description: Is the full schema structure defined?

scoringGuide.excellent: All fields, types, and requirements specified

rubric.name: Example Coverage
rubric.description: Are examples provided for different cases?

evaluatorContext.idealResponse:
Process this support ticket and return a JSON response following this exact schema:

Base fields (always required):
```json
{
  "ticket_id": "TKT-12345",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  "category": "account_access",
  "status": "resolved"
}
```

Status enum values: "resolved" | "escalated" | "pending"

Conditional fields by status:

If status = "resolved":
```json
{
  ...base_fields,
  "status": "resolved",
  "resolution_summary": "Description of how issue was resolved"
}
```

If status = "escalated":
```json
{
  ...base_fields,
  "status": "escalated",
  "escalation_reason": "Why this needs escalation",
  "priority": "high" | "medium" | "low"
}
```

If status = "pending":
```json
{
  ...base_fields,
  "status": "pending",
  "next_action": "What needs to happen next",
  "waiting_on": "customer" | "internal" | "third_party"
}
```

Category enum: "account_access" | "billing" | "technical" | "general"

Analyze the ticket and return ONLY the appropriate JSON response.

Ticket: [ticket text here]
commonMistakes: Unclear which fields are required vs optional
